case_title: VERITABLE VEGETABLE,INC. VS SMEDLEY, DOUG AND CORNUCOPIA FARMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,432.00 FILED BY VERITABLE VEGETABLE,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMEDLEY, DOUG AND CORNUCOPIA FARMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
